summary: Implemented CLI (cli.mjs) for opencode-codebase-memory with 8 commands: analyze, query, context, impact, detect-changes, list-repos, health, enrich-error. All output is JSON to stdout. Exits 0 on success, 1 on error with JSON error on stderr. Added CODEBASE_MEMORY_STATE_DIR env var support to index.js constructor for test isolation. 18 CLI subprocess tests via Bun.spawn covering all commands, flags, error paths, and unknown command handling.
